summary: Full end-to-end frontend test of Workvyb landing page after 3 requested changes (metrics section removal, recent closures reorder, dark->light theme). All 3 changes verified correctly implemented. Tested section order, hero+bottom enquiry forms (validation, invalid mobile, success+toast), header nav + mobile hamburger menu, FAQ accordion (7 items, expand/collapse), recent closures (7 cards), roles we hire (6 cards), comparison table, final CTA, footer, floating WhatsApp button - all working correctly across desktop (1920px), tablet (768px), and mobile (390px) viewports. No dark-on-dark or contrast issues found anywhere.

ui_bugs.issue: Individual closure cards lack data-testid attributes (only section-level and CTA button have testids), making it harder to assert exact card content in automated tests. Minor - not blocking, card count/content verified visually.

action_items: Optional: add data-testid to individual RecentClosures cards (e.g. recent-closure-card-{i}) for more robust future automated testing.
critical_code_review_comments: EnquiryForm.jsx is well-structured, reusable via variant prop, uses zod validation correctly for Indian mobile numbers (regex ^[6-9]\d{9}$).
LandingPage.jsx section order matches spec exactly: Header, Hero, RecentClosures, Problem, Solution, RolesWeHire, WhyWorkvyb, Process, Comparison, FAQ, FinalCTA, BottomForm, Footer, FloatingWhatsApp.
Metrics.jsx confirmed deleted and not imported anywhere in LandingPage.jsx.

Light theme consistently applied (bg-white/slate-50, text-slate-900/600, blue-600/violet-600 accents) - verified via screenshots across hero, forms, FAQ, comparison, final CTA (gradient banner), and footer with no contrast issues.

success_rate.backend: N/A - no backend for this feature

test_credentials: None required - no auth for this feature
seed_data_creation: None - frontend-only lead form, no persistence
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was the first full test pass. All 3 user-requested changes (metrics removal, recent closures reorder, light theme) verified working. Hero form, bottom form, FAQ accordion, mobile menu, floating WhatsApp, header nav all tested and passing. Only a very minor cosmetic gap: RecentClosures cards lack individual data-testid (not a functional bug). No retest needed unless new features added.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found requiring RCA
